titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Bahr Al-saqqa'
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Bahr Al-saqqa'

segments: ه عن بحر السّقاء فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن إبراهيم بن مهزيار، عن أخيه عليّ، عن حمّاد بن عيسى، عن حريز، عن بحر السقّاء و هو بحر بن كثير.
arabic.text: ه عن بحر السّقاء فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن إبراهيم بن مهزيار، عن أخيه عليّ، عن حمّاد بن عيسى، عن حريز، عن بحر السقّاء و هو بحر بن كثير.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Bahr Al-Saqqa' has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ibrahim ibn Mahziyar, from his brother Ali, from Hammad ibn 'Isa, from Hariz, from Bahr Al-Saqqa', who is Bahr ibn Kathir.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Bahr Al-Saqqa' has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ibrahim ibn Mahziyar, from his brother Ali, from Hammad ibn 'Isa, from Hariz, from Bahr Al-Saqqa', who is Bahr ibn Kathir.
